elements.text: You have a lot of work to do for one of your major classes. One of your most important homework assignments for the class is to do research about a topic and make a well-prepared, lengthy presentation to your classmates. As you imagine yourself giving your presentation, you feel...

elements.name: giving_a_presentation--social_situations--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
